title: 🔥200日成本严重倒挂
body: 市场处于极度低估的恐慌区。AHR999仅为0.33，而价格较200日定投成本$89,609偏离高达-25.4%。这种深度倒挂显示持仓浮亏极其严重，长期持筹信心已动摇。结论：偏空。在如此低廉的位置是谁在持续卖出？
body_en: The market is trapped in a zone of extreme fear and undervaluation. AHR999 is just 0.33, with price deviating -25.4% from the 200-day DCA cost of $89,609. This level of inversion reveals severe unrealized losses; long-term conviction has been shaken. Verdict: Bearish. Who is continuously selling at these bargain prices?
